final_prompt.prompt:
Create a professional documentary-style banner image for a Weibo news/hot-topic post.

Style/medium: professional documentary photography, mobile-captured aesthetic with high-end polish
Composition: wide panoramic banner, 16:9 horizontal format, ample negative space for text overlay, street-level perspective looking toward skyline
Subject: city skyline at dusk with pedestrians in motion blur, distant skyscrapers reflecting sunset
Scene/backdrop: urban cityscape transitioning from day to night, neon signs beginning to illuminate, golden hour sky meeting twilight
Lighting/mood: dramatic chiaroscuro, warm sunset glow against cool neon light, high contrast between light and shadow, authentic on-site atmosphere
Color palette: warm amber sunset tones transitioning to cool blue-purple twilight, neon pink and cyan accents
Materials/textures: photorealistic urban surfaces, glass reflections on buildings, motion-blurred figures
Text (verbatim): "城市里的安静时刻" (large headline, bold/modern font, prominent placement), "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" (subtext), "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察" (watermark, bottom or lower-right)
Constraints: horizontal panoramic composition with generous negative space for text, authentic documentary feel, sharp details, professional Weibo hot-post aesthetic
Avoid: generic stock photo look, oversaturated colors, artificial HDR effects, stuffer words like "8K" or "masterpiece"
